perturbation.original_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k)(1) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned hereby agree to the joint filing with each of the Reporting Persons (as such term is defined in the Schedule 13D referred to below) on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13D (including amendments thereto and statements on Schedule 13G) with respect to the Common Stock, par value $0.01 per share of Macy's, Inc., a corporation organized under the laws of the State of Delaware, and that this agreement may be included as an exhibit to such joint filing.
perturbation.changed_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k)(1) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned hereby agree to the joint filing with each of the Reporting Persons (as such term is defined in the Schedule 13D referred to below) on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13D (excluding amendments thereto but including statements on Schedule 13G) with respect to the Common Stock, par value $0.01 per share of Macy's, Inc., a corporation organized under the laws of the State of Delaware, and that this agreement may be included as an exhibit to such joint filing.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by excluding 'amendments thereto' from the joint filing agreement. This contradicts the standard practice and the subsequent sentence referencing 'any amendments', creating uncertainty about the scope of the agreement. Now the agreement is only on statements on Schedule 13D excluding the amendments.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k)(1) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned hereby agree to the joint filing with each of the Reporting Persons (as such term is defined in the Schedule 13D referred to below) on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13D (excluding amendments thereto but including statements on Schedule 13G) with respect to the Common Stock, par value $0.01 per share of Macy's, Inc., a corporation organized under the laws of the State of Delaware, and that this agreement may be included as an exhibit to such joint filing. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of any amendments, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the undersigned or contained herein and therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others. IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the undersigned hereby execute this agreement as of May 11, 2020. VESA EQUITY INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: Marek Spurny Title:Authorized Signatory /s/ Pascal Leclerc By: Pascal Leclerc Title:Authorized Signatory EP INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: Marek Spurny Title:Authorized Signatory /s/ Pascal Leclerc By: Pascal Leclerc Title:Authorized Signatory DANIEL KŘETÍNSKÝ /s/ Daniel Kretinsky By: Daniel Kretinsky
perturbation.justification: The changed text excludes 'amendments thereto' from the joint filing agreement, directly contradicting the subsequent sentence in the 'Contradicted Text' which refers to the responsibility for filing 'any amendments'. This creates a clear and impactful in-text contradiction regarding the scope of the joint filing agreement, making it unclear whether amendments to Schedule 13D are included or not, thus meeting the definition of 'Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of any amendments, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the undersigned or contained herein and therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others.
perturbation.changed_text: The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of any amendments, only when explicitly requested, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the undersigned or contained herein and therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others.
perturbation.explanation: The modification makes the filing of amendments conditional ('only when explicitly requested'), contradicting the general obligation established in the original agreement. This change creates uncertainty about the signatories' responsibilities and introduces a loophole where amendments might not be filed unless specifically prompted, therefore going agains the definition establised on the begining of the paragraph.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k)(1) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned hereby agree to the joint filing with each of the Reporting Persons (as such term is defined in the Schedule 13D referred to below) on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13D (including amendments thereto and statements on Schedule 13G) with respect to the Common Stock, par value $0.01 per share of Macy's, Inc., a corporation organized under the laws of the State of Delaware, and that this agreement may be included as an exhibit to such joint filing. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of any amendments, only when explicitly requested, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the undersigned or contained herein and therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others. IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the undersigned hereby execute this agreement as of May 11, 2020. VESA EQUITY INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: Marek Spurny Title:Authorized Signatory /s/ Pascal Leclerc By: Pascal Leclerc Title:Authorized Signatory EP INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: Marek Spurny Title:Authorized Signatory /s/ Pascal Leclerc By: Pascal Leclerc Title:Authorized Signatory DANIEL KŘETÍNSKÝ /s/ Daniel Kretinsky By: Daniel Kretinsky
perturbation.justification: The original text states that each party shall be responsible for the timely filing of any amendments. The changed text adds 'only when explicitly requested,' creating a contradiction. The contradicted text relies on the initial agreement that all parties involved are responsible for filing in a timely manner any amendments. By adding a caveat, this changes the responsibilities previously agreed upon. According to the 'Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction' definition, the changed text makes the signatories' responsibilities unclear. Consequently, a reasonable reader would be unable to clearly interpret the obligation to file amendments.

perturbation.original_text: VESA EQUITY INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: Marek Spurny Title:Authorized Signatory
perturbation.changed_text: VESA EQUITY INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: John Doe Title:Authorized Signatory
perturbation.explanation: The change in signatory introduces a potential conflict by having an unauthorized individual ('John Doe') sign on behalf of VESA EQUITY INVESTMENT S.À R.L. This contradicts the implicit requirement that only authorized representatives can execute the agreement, therefore creating confusion about the validity of the signature and the enforceability of the contract. This creates an in-text contradiction with the 'Authorized Signatory' title, since John Doe wasn't an authorized signatory
perturbation.contradicted_text: VESA EQUITY INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: John Doe Title:Authorized Signatory /s/ Pascal Leclerc By: Pascal Leclerc Title:Authorized Signatory EP INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: Marek Spurny Title:Authorized Signatory /s/ Pascal Leclerc By: Pascal Leclerc Title:Authorized Signatory DANIEL KŘETÍNSKÝ /s/ Daniel Kretinsky By: Daniel Kretinsky
perturbation.justification: The modification replaces the authorized signatory 'Marek Spurny' with 'John Doe,' which directly contradicts the requirement for authorized representation. The 'Authorized Signatory' title is directly undermined, as John Doe's signature now creates uncertainty about the agreement's validity. This creates a direct contradiction, making the changed text incompatible with the repeated emphasis on authorized signatories throughout the document, specifically highlighted in the 'Contradicted Text'. This aligns with the definition of 'Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction' because it introduces ambiguity about who can legitimately sign on behalf of VESA EQUITY INVESTMENT S.À R.L.
